doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document misattributes a 2014 WP29 opinion to the EDPB and states a relative-scoping position on pseudonymized data inconsistent with established EDPB doctrine and CJEU case law.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The position contradicts established EDPB doctrine and the cited "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" is actually WP29's Opinion 05/2014; the relative-controller-scoping framing here misrepresents post-Breyer/IAB Europe case law.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document misattributes a 2014 WP29 opinion to the EDPB and states a relative-scoping position on pseudonymized data inconsistent with established EDPB doctrine and CJEU case law.
